pageContext.name: Carnage
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Queen Studios are proud to present the Carnage Life-Size Bust. Queen Studios' 1/1 scale Carnage bust brings one of Marvel Comic's most iconic characters to life.   The symbiote known as Carnage has been recreated with bone white eyes, a wide-open mouth and a whipping tongue. Crafted from polystone with resin saliva, no detail has been spared as the Queen Studios team has captured the character with an incredible life-like look, even down to his ferocious teeth.   The bust stands at almost 30 inches (75cm) tall and is modeled from a variant cover of issue no.5 of Marvel Comics' series Absolute Carnage!
